title: Operational Evidence
description: Operational Evidence v1 contract for evidence packets that gather chain evidence for operations, smoke, recall, sale lock, MISA, and owner review.
$comment: Sources: appendix operational form/evidence rules and PACK-01 evidence packet. TODO: exact packet close-out fields are not finalized.

form_ids.description: Operational forms included in the packet.

trace_chain_id.description: Trace chain supported by the evidence packet when applicable.

status.description: Evidence packet status. Prefer common evidence status enum when possible.
